docs.title: Run AI website prospecting without building another list tool.
docs.summary: Use these docs to set up your profile, run scans, interpret Prospect Cards, manage credits, and export qualified research for outreach.

sections.title: Quick start
sections.copy: LeadCue works best when each scan starts from a real company website, a defined offer, and a clear reason why the prospect matters.
items: Sign in with Google or email and complete the scoring profile.
Choose the monthly scan volume that matches how often you review websites.
Load one real prospect URL, add visible website notes, and run the first scan.
Review the Prospect Card before copying first lines or exporting the prospect.

sections.title: How to read a Prospect Card
sections.copy: Every saved card is meant to answer three questions fast: why this prospect fits, what the website proves, and what you should say next.
items: Fit score combines your offer, industry, geography, and signal quality.
Signals and source notes keep claims attached to visible website evidence.
First line and short email stay grounded in the saved evidence instead of generic personalization.
Export fields keep source-backed context tied to the same prospect record.

sections.title: Operating model
sections.copy: LeadCue is the research layer before outreach. It should sharpen qualification, not replace human review or compliance checks.
items: Run scans only on prospects you actually want to evaluate.
Save prospects when the website evidence is specific enough to justify contact.
Use CSV exports to move only qualified research downstream.
Refresh ICP settings any time your offer, regions, or target industries change.

support.title: Get help with login access, billing, scans, exports, and setup questions.
support.summary: Support is structured around the actual personal prospecting workflow: signing in, configuring your profile, scanning websites, exporting prospects, and staying within plan limits.

sections.title: Login access
sections.copy: Most login issues are recoverable in-product before they become a support ticket.
items: Use Google sign-in if the profile was created with OAuth.
Use the email password flow if you created an email login.
Reset password from the login page when the work email is correct but the password is unknown.
Include the login email and any auth_error message if support is still needed.

sections.title: Scanning, credits, and exports
sections.copy: The fastest support turnaround comes from a clear explanation of what was scanned, what you expected, and whether the issue affected credits or exports.
items: Share the prospect URL or scan ID when a Prospect Card looks weak or incomplete.
Mention whether the scan was basic or deep and whether credits were charged.
Include the export preset or destination naming mode when CSV output looks wrong.
Attach the expected outcome and the actual result so support can reproduce it.

sections.title: Billing and launch service levels
sections.copy: LeadCue currently prioritizes billing blockers, login access, and scan-quality issues that stop personal prospecting work week to week.
items: Billing portal and subscription state issues are prioritized first.
Plan-fit questions should include expected monthly scan volume.
Security or privacy concerns should be sent directly to support@leadcue.app.
Feature requests should describe the outbound workflow they would unlock.

contact.title: Talk to LeadCue about personal prospecting workflows, plan fit, and setup.
contact.summary: Use contact when you need help deciding if the product matches your workflow, how to map fields into CSV, or how to use AI website prospecting in your weekly outreach.

sections.title: Who LeadCue is for
sections.copy: LeadCue is strongest for solo professionals selling web design, SEO, CRO, positioning, or related services where visible website evidence creates a credible outreach angle.
items: Solo founders building a weekly outbound habit.
Web design freelancers who need better qualification before list export.
Independent consultants who want export-ready research instead of generic leads.
Individual sales operators who need a clear path from research to outreach.

sections.title: What to discuss before rollout
sections.copy: A good rollout conversation starts from one real workflow and one real offer, not from abstract tool comparisons.
items: What a qualified prospect looks like for your offer.
Where saved Prospect Cards should go after review.
Which website signals matter most for your offer.
How much monthly scan volume you will realistically use.

sections.title: What LeadCue does not replace
sections.copy: The product fits best when expectations are crisp: it improves research quality and transfer to downstream tools, but it is not your full outbound stack.
items: LeadCue does not send campaigns.
LeadCue does not scrape LinkedIn or build contact databases.
LeadCue does not replace legal review.
LeadCue does not remove the need for human judgment before contact.

privacy.title: Privacy principles for website-first prospect research.
privacy.summary: LeadCue is built around user-triggered website analysis, profile setup data, secure login sessions, and saved research needed for personal outreach.

sections.title: Data we process
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.
Prospect website snapshots, generated notes, activity log changes, and saved Prospect Cards.

sections.title: Boundaries and prohibited collection
sections.copy: LeadCue is not designed to silently observe user browsing or build hidden contact intelligence.
items: Scans are user-triggered or sent through the API by the customer.
LinkedIn scraping and background browsing collection are outside the product boundary.
Contact details are limited to public website paths when visible on scanned pages.
Exports contain saved research and mapped fields, not purchased data.

sections.title: Security and retention controls
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
Password resets use short-lived, one-time tokens.
Billing operations are routed through Stripe when payment is configured.
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: Acceptable use
sections.copy: Use LeadCue to analyze public company websites and prepare better outbound research. Customers remain responsible for lawful use and message compliance.
items: Run scans only for lawful business prospecting workflows.
Respect website, platform, and outreach-tool policies.
Do not use LeadCue to automate spam or build unwanted contact lists.
Review generated copy before it is sent anywhere.

sections.title: Plans, credits, and subscriptions
sections.copy: Plans are organized around monthly website-scan capacity, with deeper analysis using more credits when configured.
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
Deep scans can consume additional credits based on the published plan rules.
Paid subscriptions use Stripe when billing is configured.
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: Product boundary and responsibility
sections.copy: LeadCue is the research layer before outreach. It does not guarantee sales outcomes and should be treated as decision support plus structured export.
items: LeadCue does not send campaigns.
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
Generated Prospect Cards are informational and should be reviewed by the customer.
Customers remain responsible for how exported data and outreach copy are used.

sections.title: 我们处理的数据
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.

sections.title: 边界和禁止收集
sections.copy: LeadCue 并非旨在默默观察用户浏览或构建隐藏的联系智能。
items: 扫描由用户触发或由客户通过 API 发送。

sections.title: 安全和保留控制
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
密码重置使用短暂的一次性令牌。
配置付款时，计费操作将通过 Stripe 进行路由。
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.

sections.title: 可接受的使用
sections.copy: 使用 LeadCue 分析上市公司网站并准备更好的对外研究。客户仍然对合法使用和消息合规性负责。
items: 仅针对合法的业务勘探工作流程运行扫描。
尊重网站、平台和外展工具政策。
不要使用 LeadCue 自动发送垃圾邮件或构建不需要的联系人列表。
在发送到任何地方之前检查生成的副本。

sections.title: 计划、积分和订阅
sections.copy: 计划围绕每月网站扫描容量进行组织，并在配置时使用更多积分进行更深入的分析。
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
深度扫描可能会根据已发布的计划规则消耗额外的积分。
付费订阅在配置计费时使用 Stripe。
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: 产品边界和责任

客户仍然对如何使用导出的数据和外展副本负责。

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: 許容される使用法
sections.copy: LeadCue を使用して公開企業の Webサイトを分析し、より適切なアウトバウンド調査を準備します。お客様は、合法的な使用とメッセージの遵守について引き続き責任を負います。
items: 合法的なビジネス見込み客ワークフローに対してのみスキャンを実行します。
Webサイト、プラットフォーム、アウトリーチツールのポリシーを尊重します。
スパムを自動化したり、不要な連絡先リストを作成したりするために LeadCue を使用しないでください。
生成されたコピーを送信する前に確認します。

sections.title: プラン、クレジット、サブスクリプション
sections.copy: プランは、毎月の Webサイト スキャン容量を中心に編成されており、構成するとより多くのクレジットを使用してより詳細な分析が行われます。
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
ディープ スキャンでは、公開されたプラン ルールに基づいて追加のクレジットを消費する可能性があります。
有料サブスクリプションでは、課金が構成されている場合に Stripe を使用します。
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: 製品の境界と責任
sections.copy: LeadCue は、アウトリーチ前のリサーチ層です。これは販売結果を保証するものではなく、意思決定のサポートと構造化された輸出として扱う必要があります。
items: LeadCue はキャンペーンを送信しません。
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
生成された見込みカードは情報提供のため、お客様が確認する必要があります。
エクスポートされたデータとアウトリーチ コピーがどのように使用されるかについては、引き続きお客様の責任となります。

sections.title: 빠른 시작
sections.copy: LeadCue works best when each scan starts from a real company website, a defined offer, and a clear reason why the prospect matters.

Choose the monthly scan volume that matches how often you review websites.

Review the Prospect Card before copying first lines or exporting the prospect.

sections.title: 잠재 고객 카드를 읽는 방법
sections.copy: Every saved card is meant to answer three questions fast: why this prospect fits, what the website proves, and what you should say next.
items: 적합도 점수는 제안, 산업, 지역 및 신호 품질을 결합합니다.
신호 및 소스 메모는 눈에 보이는 웹사이트 증거에 대한 주장을 계속 첨부합니다.
첫 번째 줄과 짧은 이메일은 일반적인 개인화 대신 저장된 증거를 기반으로 합니다.
Export fields keep source-backed context tied to the same prospect record.

sections.title: 운영 모델
sections.copy: LeadCue is the research layer before outreach. It should sharpen qualification, not replace human review or compliance checks.
items: Run scans only on prospects you actually want to evaluate.
Save prospects when the website evidence is specific enough to justify contact.
Use CSV exports to move only qualified research downstream.
제품, 지역 또는 대상 산업이 변경될 때마다 ICP 설정을 새로 고칩니다.

support.title: Get help with login access, billing, scans, exports, and setup questions.
support.summary: Support is structured around the actual personal prospecting workflow: signing in, configuring your profile, scanning websites, exporting prospects, and staying within plan limits.

sections.title: Login access
sections.copy: 대부분의 로그인 문제는 지원 티켓이 되기 전에 제품 내에서 복구할 수 있습니다.
items: Use Google sign-in if the profile was created with OAuth.
Use the email password flow if you created an email login.
업무용 이메일은 정확하지만 비밀번호를 알 수 없는 경우 로그인 페이지에서 비밀번호를 재설정하세요.
Include the login email and any auth_error message if support is still needed.

sections.title: 스캔, 크레딧 및 내보내기
sections.copy: 가장 빠른 지원 처리는 스캔한 내용, 예상한 내용, 문제가 크레딧이나 내보내기에 영향을 미쳤는지에 대한 명확한 설명에서 비롯됩니다.
items: 잠재 고객 카드가 약하거나 불완전해 보이는 경우 잠재 고객 URL 또는 스캔 ID를 공유하세요.
스캔이 기본인지 심층인지, 크레딧이 청구되었는지 언급합니다.
Include the export preset or destination naming mode when CSV output looks wrong.
지원개인 사용자에서 재현할 수 있도록 예상 결과와 실제 결과를 첨부하세요.

sections.title: 청구 및 출시 서비스 수준
sections.copy: LeadCue currently prioritizes billing blockers, login access, and scan-quality issues that stop personal prospecting work week to week.
items: 청구 포털 및 구독 상태 문제가 우선적으로 처리됩니다.
Plan-fit questions should include expected monthly scan volume.
보안 또는 개인 정보 보호 문제는 support@leadcue.app으로 직접 보내야 합니다.
기능 요청은 잠금 해제할 아웃바운드 워크플로를 설명해야 합니다.

contact.title: Talk to LeadCue about personal prospecting workflows, plan fit, and setup.
contact.summary: Use contact when you need help deciding if the product matches your workflow, how to map fields into CSV, or how to use AI website prospecting in your weekly outreach.

sections.title: LeadCue는 누구를 위한 것인가요?
sections.copy: LeadCue is strongest for solo professionals selling web design, SEO, CRO, positioning, or related services where visible website evidence creates a credible outreach angle.
items: 매주 아웃바운드 습관을 구축하는 솔로 창업자.
Web design freelancers who need better qualification before list export.
Independent consultants who want export-ready research instead of generic leads.
Individual sales operators who need a clear path from research to outreach.

sections.title: 출시 전 논의할 사항
sections.copy: 좋은 출시 대화는 추상적인 도구 비교가 아닌 하나의 실제 워크플로와 하나의 실제 제안에서 시작됩니다.
items: What a qualified prospect looks like for your offer.
저장된 잠재 고객 카드는 검토 후 어디로 이동해야 합니까?
귀하의 제안에 가장 중요한 웹사이트 신호는 무엇입니까?
How much monthly scan volume you will realistically use.

sections.title: LeadCue가 대체하지 않는 것
sections.copy: 이 제품은 기대치가 명확할 때 가장 적합합니다. 연구 품질을 향상하고 다운스트림 도구로의 전송을 향상하지만 전체 아웃바운드 스택은 아닙니다.
items: LeadCue는 캠페인을 보내지 않습니다.
LeadCue는 LinkedIn을 스크랩하거나 연락처 데이터베이스를 구축하지 않습니다.
LeadCue does not replace legal review.
LeadCue는 접촉 전 인간 판단의 필요성을 제거하지 않습니다.

privacy.title: 웹사이트 우선 잠재 고객 조사에 대한 개인 정보 보호 원칙.
privacy.summary: LeadCue is built around user-triggered website analysis, profile setup data, secure login sessions, and saved research needed for personal outreach.

sections.title: 당사가 처리하는 데이터
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.
잠재 고객 웹사이트 스냅샷, 생성된 메모, 활동 로그 변경 사항 및 저장된 잠재 고객 카드.

sections.title: 경계 및 수집 금지
sections.copy: LeadCue는 사용자 탐색을 조용히 관찰하거나 숨겨진 접촉 인텔리전스를 구축하도록 설계되지 않았습니다.
items: 스캔은 사용자가 실행하거나 고객이 API를 통해 전송합니다.
LinkedIn 스크래핑 및 백그라운드 탐색 컬렉션은 제품 범위를 벗어납니다.
스캔된 페이지에 표시되는 경우 연락처 세부정보는 공개 웹사이트 경로로 제한됩니다.
내보내기에는 구매한 데이터가 아닌 저장된 연구 및 매핑된 필드가 포함됩니다.

sections.title: 보안 및 보존 통제
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
비밀번호 재설정에는 수명이 짧은 일회성 토큰이 사용됩니다.
결제가 구성되면 결제 작업은 Stripe을 통해 라우팅됩니다.
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: 허용되는 사용
sections.copy: LeadCue를 사용하여 공개 회사 웹사이트를 분석하고 더 나은 아웃바운드 조사를 준비하세요. 고객은 합법적인 사용 및 메시지 준수에 대한 책임을 집니다.
items: 합법적인 비즈니스 발굴 워크플로에 대해서만 스캔을 실행하세요.
웹사이트, 플랫폼, 지원 도구 정책을 존중합니다.
LeadCue를 사용하여 스팸을 자동화하거나 원치 않는 연락처 목록을 작성하지 마십시오.
생성된 사본을 어디로든 보내기 전에 검토하세요.

sections.title: 요금제, 크레딧, 구독
sections.copy: 계획은 월별 웹사이트 스캔 용량을 중심으로 구성되며 구성 시 더 많은 크레딧을 사용하여 심층 분석됩니다.
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
정밀 스캔은 게시된 계획 규칙에 따라 추가 크레딧을 소비할 수 있습니다.
유료 구독은 청구가 구성될 때 Stripe을 사용합니다.
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: 제품 범위 및 책임
sections.copy: LeadCue는 지원 이전의 연구 계층입니다. 이는 판매 결과를 보장하지 않으며 의사결정 지원과 구조화된 수출로 처리되어야 합니다.
items: LeadCue는 캠페인을 보내지 않습니다.
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
생성된 잠재 고객 카드는 정보 제공용이므로 고객이 검토해야 합니다.
내보낸 데이터와 홍보 사본이 사용되는 방식에 대한 책임은 고객에게 있습니다.

docs.title: Run AI website prospecting without building another list tool.
docs.summary: Use these docs to set up your profile, run scans, interpret Prospect Cards, manage credits, and export qualified research for outreach.

sections.title: Schnellstart
sections.copy: LeadCue works best when each scan starts from a real company website, a defined offer, and a clear reason why the prospect matters.
items: Sign in with Google or email and complete the scoring profile.
Choose the monthly scan volume that matches how often you review websites.
Laden Sie eine echte potenzielle URL, fügen Sie sichtbare Website-Notizen hinzu und führen Sie den ersten Scan durch.
Review the Prospect Card before copying first lines or exporting the prospect.

sections.title: So lesen Sie eine Prospektkarte
sections.copy: Every saved card is meant to answer three questions fast: why this prospect fits, what the website proves, and what you should say next.
items: Der Fit-Score kombiniert Ihr Angebot, Ihre Branche, Ihre Region und Ihre Signalqualität.
Signale und Quellenhinweise halten Ansprüche an sichtbare Website-Beweise geknüpft.
Die erste Zeile und die kurze E-Mail basieren auf den gespeicherten Beweisen und nicht auf allgemeiner Personalisierung.
Export fields keep source-backed context tied to the same prospect record.

sections.title: Betriebsmodell
sections.copy: LeadCue is the research layer before outreach. It should sharpen qualification, not replace human review or compliance checks.
items: Run scans only on prospects you actually want to evaluate.
Save prospects when the website evidence is specific enough to justify contact.
Use CSV exports to move only qualified research downstream.
Aktualisieren Sie die ICP-Einstellungen jederzeit, wenn sich Ihr Angebot, Ihre Regionen oder Ihre Zielbranchen ändern.

support.title: Get help with login access, billing, scans, exports, and setup questions.
support.summary: Support is structured around the actual personal prospecting workflow: signing in, configuring your profile, scanning websites, exporting prospects, and staying within plan limits.

sections.title: Login access
sections.copy: Die meisten Anmeldeprobleme können im Produkt behoben werden, bevor sie zu einem Support-Ticket werden.
items: Use Google sign-in if the profile was created with OAuth.
Use the email password flow if you created an email login.
Setzen Sie das Passwort von der Anmeldeseite zurück, wenn die geschäftliche E-Mail-Adresse korrekt ist, das Passwort jedoch unbekannt ist.
Include the login email and any auth_error message if support is still needed.

sections.title: Scannen, Gutschriften und Exporte
sections.copy: Die schnellste Support-Abwicklung erfolgt durch eine klare Erklärung dessen, was gescannt wurde, was Sie erwartet haben und ob sich das Problem auf Gutschriften oder Exporte ausgewirkt hat.
items: Geben Sie die URL des potenziellen Kunden weiter oder scannen Sie die ID, wenn eine Karte des potenziellen Kunden schwach oder unvollständig erscheint.
Geben Sie an, ob der Scan einfach oder umfassend war und ob Credits berechnet wurden.
Include the export preset or destination naming mode when CSV output looks wrong.
Hängen Sie das erwartete Ergebnis und das tatsächliche Ergebnis an, damit der Support es reproduzieren kann.

sections.title: Abrechnungs- und Startservicelevel
sections.copy: LeadCue currently prioritizes billing blockers, login access, and scan-quality issues that stop personal prospecting work week to week.
items: Probleme mit dem Abrechnungsportal und dem Abonnementstatus werden zuerst priorisiert.
Plan-fit questions should include expected monthly scan volume.
Sicherheits- oder Datenschutzbedenken sollten direkt an support@leadcue.app gesendet werden.
Funktionsanfragen sollten den ausgehenden Workflow beschreiben, den sie freischalten würden.

contact.title: Talk to LeadCue about personal prospecting workflows, plan fit, and setup.
contact.summary: Use contact when you need help deciding if the product matches your workflow, how to map fields into CSV, or how to use AI website prospecting in your weekly outreach.

sections.title: Für wen LeadCue gedacht ist
sections.copy: LeadCue is strongest for solo professionals selling web design, SEO, CRO, positioning, or related services where visible website evidence creates a credible outreach angle.
items: Solo-Gründer entwickeln eine wöchentliche Outbound-Gewohnheit.
Web design freelancers who need better qualification before list export.
Independent consultants who want export-ready research instead of generic leads.
Individual sales operators who need a clear path from research to outreach.

sections.title: Was vor der Einführung besprochen werden sollte
sections.copy: Ein gutes Rollout-Gespräch beginnt mit einem echten Workflow und einem echten Angebot, nicht mit abstrakten Tool-Vergleichen.
items: What a qualified prospect looks like for your offer.
Wo gespeicherte Interessentenkarten nach der Überprüfung aufbewahrt werden sollen.
Welche Website-Signale für Ihr Angebot am wichtigsten sind.
How much monthly scan volume you will realistically use.

sections.title: Was LeadCue nicht ersetzt
sections.copy: Das Produkt passt am besten, wenn die Erwartungen klar sind: Es verbessert die Forschungsqualität und die Übertragung auf nachgelagerte Tools, ist aber nicht Ihr vollständiger Outbound-Stack.
items: LeadCue versendet keine Kampagnen.
LeadCue durchsucht weder LinkedIn noch erstellt es Kontaktdatenbanken.
LeadCue does not replace legal review.
LeadCue macht ein menschliches Urteilsvermögen vor dem Kontakt nicht überflüssig.

privacy.title: Datenschutzgrundsätze für die Website-First-Interessentenrecherche.
privacy.summary: LeadCue is built around user-triggered website analysis, profile setup data, secure login sessions, and saved research needed for personal outreach.

sections.title: Daten, die wir verarbeiten
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.
Schnappschüsse der Website potenzieller Kunden, generierte Notizen, Änderungen im Aktivitätsprotokoll und gespeicherte Karten potenzieller Kunden.

sections.title: Grenzen und verbotene Sammlung
sections.copy: LeadCue ist nicht darauf ausgelegt, das Surfen von Benutzern stillschweigend zu beobachten oder versteckte Kontaktinformationen aufzubauen.
items: Scans werden vom Benutzer ausgelöst oder vom Kunden über die API gesendet.
LinkedIn-Scraping und Hintergrund-Browsing-Sammlung liegen außerhalb der Produktgrenzen.
Kontaktdaten sind auf öffentliche Website-Pfade beschränkt, wenn sie auf gescannten Seiten sichtbar sind.
Exporte enthalten gespeicherte Recherchen und zugeordnete Felder, keine gekauften Daten.

sections.title: Sicherheits- und Aufbewahrungskontrollen
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
Beim Zurücksetzen von Passwörtern werden kurzlebige, einmalige Token verwendet.
Abrechnungsvorgänge werden über Stripe weitergeleitet, wenn die Zahlung konfiguriert ist.
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: Akzeptable Verwendung
sections.copy: Verwenden Sie LeadCue, um die Websites öffentlicher Unternehmen zu analysieren und bessere Outbound-Recherchen vorzubereiten. Kunden bleiben für die rechtmäßige Nutzung und die Einhaltung der Nachrichten verantwortlich.
items: Führen Sie Scans nur für rechtmäßige Geschäftsakquise-Workflows durch.
Respektieren Sie die Website-, Plattform- und Outreach-Tool-Richtlinien.
Verwenden Sie LeadCue nicht, um Spam zu automatisieren oder unerwünschte Kontaktlisten zu erstellen.
Überprüfen Sie die generierte Kopie, bevor sie irgendwohin gesendet wird.

sections.title: Pläne, Credits und Abonnements
sections.copy: Die Pläne basieren auf der monatlichen Website-Scan-Kapazität, wobei eine tiefergehende Analyse bei entsprechender Konfiguration mehr Credits erfordert.
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
Tiefenscans können basierend auf den veröffentlichten Planregeln zusätzliche Credits verbrauchen.
Bezahlte Abonnements verwenden Stripe, wenn die Abrechnung konfiguriert ist.
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: Produktgrenze und Verantwortung
sections.copy: LeadCue ist die Rechercheebene vor der Ansprache. Es garantiert keine Verkaufsergebnisse und sollte als Entscheidungshilfe und strukturierter Export betrachtet werden.
items: LeadCue versendet keine Kampagnen.
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
Die generierten Interessentenkarten dienen der Information und sollten vom Kunden überprüft werden.
Kunden bleiben dafür verantwortlich, wie exportierte Daten und Outreach-Kopie verwendet werden.

Laad één echte prospect-URL, voeg zichtbare websitenotities toe en voer de eerste scan uit.

Use the email password flow if you created an email login.
Wachtwoord opnieuw instellen vanaf de inlogpagina als het zakelijke e-mailadres correct is, maar het wachtwoord onbekend is.
Include the login email and any auth_error message if support is still needed.

sections.title: Scannen, crediteren en exporteren
sections.copy: De snelste ondersteuningstermijn komt voort uit een duidelijke uitleg van wat er is gescand, wat u verwachtte en of het probleem van invloed was op de kredieten of op de export.
items: Deel de prospect-URL of scan-ID wanneer een prospectkaart er zwak of onvolledig uitziet.
Vermeld of de scan eenvoudig of diep was en of er credits in rekening werden gebracht.
Include the export preset or destination naming mode when CSV output looks wrong.
Voeg het verwachte resultaat en het daadwerkelijke resultaat toe, zodat de ondersteuning dit kan reproduceren.

sections.copy: LeadCue currently prioritizes billing blockers, login access, and scan-quality issues that stop personal prospecting work week to week.

sections.copy: Een goed implementatiegesprek begint met één echte workflow en één echt aanbod, niet met abstracte toolvergelijkingen.
items: What a qualified prospect looks like for your offer.
Waar opgeslagen prospectkaarten na beoordeling naartoe moeten gaan.
Welke websitesignalen het belangrijkst zijn voor uw aanbod.
How much monthly scan volume you will realistically use.

privacy.title: Privacyprincipes voor website-first prospectonderzoek.
privacy.summary: LeadCue is built around user-triggered website analysis, profile setup data, secure login sessions, and saved research needed for personal outreach.

primaryAction.label: Neem contact op met de privacyondersteuning

sections.title: Gegevens die wij verwerken
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.
Momentopnamen van prospectwebsites, gegenereerde notities, wijzigingen in het activiteitenlogboek en opgeslagen prospectkaarten.

sections.title: Grenzen en verboden verzameling
sections.copy: LeadCue is niet ontworpen om het browsen van gebruikers stil te observeren of om verborgen contactinformatie op te bouwen.
items: Scans worden door de gebruiker geactiveerd of door de klant via de API verzonden.
Het verzamelen van LinkedIn-scraping en browsen op de achtergrond valt buiten de productgrenzen.
Contactgegevens zijn beperkt tot openbare websitepaden indien zichtbaar op gescande pagina's.
Exporten bevatten opgeslagen onderzoek en in kaart gebrachte velden, geen aangekochte gegevens.

sections.title: Beveiligings- en bewaarcontroles
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
Voor het opnieuw instellen van wachtwoorden worden tijdelijke, eenmalige tokens gebruikt.
Factureringsbewerkingen worden via Stripe gerouteerd wanneer de betaling is geconfigureerd.
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: Acceptabel gebruik
sections.copy: Gebruik LeadCue om websites van beursgenoteerde bedrijven te analyseren en beter uitgaand onderzoek voor te bereiden. Klanten blijven verantwoordelijk voor rechtmatig gebruik en naleving van berichten.
items: Voer scans alleen uit voor legale workflows voor zakelijke prospectie.
Respecteer het beleid voor websites, platforms en outreachtools.
Gebruik LeadCue niet om spam te automatiseren of ongewenste contactlijsten samen te stellen.
Controleer de gegenereerde kopie voordat deze ergens naartoe wordt verzonden.

sections.title: Abonnementen, tegoeden en abonnementen
sections.copy: Plannen zijn georganiseerd rond de maandelijkse websitescancapaciteit, waarbij diepere analyses gebruik maken van meer tegoeden indien geconfigureerd.
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
Diepe scans kunnen extra credits verbruiken op basis van de gepubliceerde planregels.
Betaalde abonnementen gebruiken Stripe wanneer de facturering is geconfigureerd.
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: Productgrens en verantwoordelijkheid
sections.copy: LeadCue is de onderzoekslaag vóór outreach. Het garandeert geen verkoopresultaten en moet worden behandeld als beslissingsondersteuning plus gestructureerde export.
items: LeadCue verzendt geen campagnes.
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
Gegenereerde prospectkaarten zijn informatief en moeten door de klant worden beoordeeld.
Klanten blijven verantwoordelijk voor de manier waarop geëxporteerde gegevens en outreach-kopieën worden gebruikt.

docs.title: Run AI website prospecting without building another list tool.
docs.summary: Use these docs to set up your profile, run scans, interpret Prospect Cards, manage credits, and export qualified research for outreach.

sections.title: Démarrage rapide
sections.copy: LeadCue works best when each scan starts from a real company website, a defined offer, and a clear reason why the prospect matters.
items: Sign in with Google or email and complete the scoring profile.
Choose the monthly scan volume that matches how often you review websites.
Chargez une véritable URL de prospect, ajoutez des notes de site Web visibles et exécutez la première analyse.
Review the Prospect Card before copying first lines or exporting the prospect.

sections.title: Comment lire une carte de prospect
sections.copy: Every saved card is meant to answer three questions fast: why this prospect fits, what the website proves, and what you should say next.
items: Le score d'ajustement combine votre offre, votre secteur d'activité, votre zone géographique et la qualité du signal.
Les signaux et les notes sources maintiennent les allégations attachées aux preuves visibles sur le site Web.
La première ligne et les e-mails courts restent basés sur les preuves enregistrées au lieu d'une personnalisation générique.
Export fields keep source-backed context tied to the same prospect record.

sections.title: Modèle opérationnel
sections.copy: LeadCue is the research layer before outreach. It should sharpen qualification, not replace human review or compliance checks.
items: Run scans only on prospects you actually want to evaluate.
Save prospects when the website evidence is specific enough to justify contact.
Use CSV exports to move only qualified research downstream.
Actualisez les paramètres ICP à chaque fois que votre offre, vos régions ou vos secteurs cibles changent.

support.title: Get help with login access, billing, scans, exports, and setup questions.
support.summary: Support is structured around the actual personal prospecting workflow: signing in, configuring your profile, scanning websites, exporting prospects, and staying within plan limits.

sections.title: Login access
sections.copy: La plupart des problèmes de connexion sont récupérables dans le produit avant de devenir un ticket d'assistance.
items: Use Google sign-in if the profile was created with OAuth.
Use the email password flow if you created an email login.
Réinitialisez le mot de passe à partir de la page de connexion lorsque l'e-mail professionnel est correct mais que le mot de passe est inconnu.
Include the login email and any auth_error message if support is still needed.

sections.title: Numérisation, crédits et exportations
sections.copy: Le délai d'exécution de l'assistance le plus rapide vient d'une explication claire de ce qui a été numérisé, de ce à quoi vous vous attendiez et si le problème a affecté les crédits ou les exportations.
items: Partagez l'URL du prospect ou scannez l'identifiant lorsqu'une carte de prospect semble faible ou incomplète.
Mentionnez si l'analyse était basique ou approfondie et si des crédits ont été facturés.
Include the export preset or destination naming mode when CSV output looks wrong.
Joignez le résultat attendu et le résultat réel afin que le support puisse le reproduire.

sections.title: Niveaux de service de facturation et de lancement
sections.copy: LeadCue currently prioritizes billing blockers, login access, and scan-quality issues that stop personal prospecting work week to week.
items: Les problèmes liés au portail de facturation et à l'état de l'abonnement sont prioritaires.
Plan-fit questions should include expected monthly scan volume.
Les problèmes de sécurité ou de confidentialité doivent être envoyés directement à support@leadcue.app.
Les demandes de fonctionnalités doivent décrire le flux de travail sortant qu'elles débloqueraient.

contact.title: Talk to LeadCue about personal prospecting workflows, plan fit, and setup.
contact.summary: Use contact when you need help deciding if the product matches your workflow, how to map fields into CSV, or how to use AI website prospecting in your weekly outreach.

sections.title: À qui s'adresse LeadCue
sections.copy: LeadCue is strongest for solo professionals selling web design, SEO, CRO, positioning, or related services where visible website evidence creates a credible outreach angle.
items: Les fondateurs solo développent une habitude hebdomadaire de sorties.
Web design freelancers who need better qualification before list export.
Independent consultants who want export-ready research instead of generic leads.
Individual sales operators who need a clear path from research to outreach.

sections.title: Points à discuter avant le déploiement
sections.copy: Une bonne conversation sur le déploiement commence à partir d'un flux de travail réel et d'une offre réelle, et non de comparaisons abstraites d'outils.
items: What a qualified prospect looks like for your offer.
Où les cartes de prospect enregistrées doivent être placées après examen.
Quels signaux de sites Web sont les plus importants pour votre offre.
How much monthly scan volume you will realistically use.

sections.title: Ce que LeadCue ne remplace pas
sections.copy: Le produit convient mieux lorsque les attentes sont précises : il améliore la qualité de la recherche et le transfert vers les outils en aval, mais il ne constitue pas votre pile sortante complète.
items: LeadCue n'envoie pas de campagnes.
LeadCue ne supprime pas LinkedIn et ne crée pas de bases de données de contacts.
LeadCue does not replace legal review.
LeadCue ne supprime pas le besoin de jugement humain avant le contact.

privacy.title: Principes de confidentialité pour la recherche de prospects axée sur le site Web.
privacy.summary: LeadCue is built around user-triggered website analysis, profile setup data, secure login sessions, and saved research needed for personal outreach.

primaryAction.label: Contacter l'assistance en matière de confidentialité

sections.title: Données que nous traitons
sections.copy: Profile data is intentionally narrow and tied to the product workflow rather than passive collection.
items: Login identity from Google OAuth or email signup.
Plan, subscription state, and scan-credit usage.
ICP settings used to score prospect websites.
Instantanés du site Web des prospects, notes générées, modifications du journal d'activité et cartes de prospects enregistrées.

sections.title: Limites et collecte interdite
sections.copy: LeadCue n'est pas conçu pour observer silencieusement la navigation des utilisateurs ou créer des informations de contact cachées.
items: Les analyses sont déclenchées par l'utilisateur ou envoyées via l'API par le client.
Le scraping LinkedIn et la collecte de navigation en arrière-plan sont en dehors des limites du produit.
Les coordonnées sont limitées aux chemins d'accès aux sites Web publics lorsqu'elles sont visibles sur les pages numérisées.
Les exportations contiennent des recherches enregistrées et des champs mappés, et non des données achetées.

sections.title: Contrôles de sécurité et de conservation
sections.copy: Users should be able to understand what was stored, why it was stored, and how it will leave the product.
items: Login sessions use server-side cookies instead of exposing tokens in the client.
Les réinitialisations de mot de passe utilisent des jetons uniques et de courte durée.
Les opérations de facturation sont acheminées via Stripe lorsque le paiement est configuré.
Users can contact support for privacy questions or deletion requests.

terms.title: Commercial usage terms for LeadCue users.
terms.summary: These terms describe the intended product boundary: website research, prospect qualification, secure login access, and export-ready notes for solo professionals.

sections.title: Utilisation acceptable
sections.copy: Utilisez LeadCue pour analyser les sites Web des entreprises publiques et préparer de meilleures recherches sortantes. Les clients restent responsables de l’utilisation licite et du respect des messages.
items: Exécutez des analyses uniquement pour les flux de travail de prospection commerciale légaux.
Respectez les politiques du site Web, de la plateforme et des outils de prospection.
N'utilisez pas LeadCue pour automatiser le spam ou créer des listes de contacts indésirables.
Examinez la copie générée avant qu'elle ne soit envoyée n'importe où.

sections.title:
Forfaits, crédits et abonnements
Les forfaits
sections.copy: sont organisés autour d'une capacité d'analyse mensuelle du site Web, avec une analyse plus approfondie utilisant plus de crédits une fois configurés.
items: The Free plan includes limited monthly scan volume.
Les analyses approfondies peuvent consommer des crédits supplémentaires en fonction des règles du plan publié.
Les abonnements payants utilisent Stripe lorsque la facturation est configurée.
Customers are responsible for monitoring plan fit, credits, and usage.

sections.title: Limite et responsabilité du produit
sections.copy: LeadCue est la couche de recherche avant la prospection. Il ne garantit pas les résultats des ventes et doit être traité comme une aide à la décision et une exportation structurée.
items: LeadCue n'envoie pas de campagnes.
LeadCue does not replace compliance review.
Les cartes de prospect générées sont informatives et doivent être examinées par le client.
Les clients restent responsables de la manière dont les données exportées et les copies de prospection sont utilisées.
